title: Working Is Part of How I Love Them
subtitle: An affirmation for working mothers carrying guilt between two places
excerpt: An affirmation for mothers who work and carry the guilt of it. Use it to name what working gives, not only what it takes.

practice.whenToUse: Use at the school drop-off, or when the guilt of leaving them is sitting on your chest before a work day.

content.text: Working-mum guilt frames work as the thing taken from the children. This affirmation frames it as the thing given. Both can be true at once. The affirmation names the version that is harder to hold onto during the school run.
Working is part of how I love them.

Say it three times before you walk into the building or sit down at your desk. Say it again if the guilt returns during the day. It does not argue with the guilt or push it away. It adds a second true thing alongside it.
